name: HierarchicObject
summary: The HierarchicObject class defines an object in a tree-structured hierarchy. The hierarchy structure is defined by hierarchical definitions which the hierarchical objects instantiate. Hierarchical objects may contain other hierarchical objects, thus forming a sub-hierarchy, or model objects.

constructors.name: HierarchicObject()
constructors.summary: Creates a new hierarchical object instance.

constructors.name: HierarchicObject(Identifier)
constructors.summary: Instantiates a hierarchical object with a known identifier. The instantiation has to be done before the hierarchical definition instance can be selected.

params.name: ID
params.doc: The identifier of an existing hierarchical object.

methods.name: AddObjects
methods.summary: Associates model objects with the hierarchical object. Fails if the hierarchical definition doesn't exist in the model.

params.name: Objects
params.doc: The model objects.

returns.doc: True if successful.

methods.name: CompareTo
methods.summary: Compares Identifiers of model objects.

params.name: obj
params.doc: The model object to be used in comparison.

returns.doc: 0 if object Identifiers are the same, 1 if given object Identifier is bigger, -1 otherwise.

methods.name: Delete
methods.summary: Deletes the hierarchical object instance from the model. The ID must be set.

returns.doc: True if the deletion was successful.

methods.name: Equals
methods.summary: Check if Identifiers of model objects are same.

params.name: other
params.doc: The model object to be used in comparison.

returns.doc: true if object Identifiers are the same, false otherwise,

methods.name: GetAllReportProperties
methods.signature: public bool GetAllReportProperties(ArrayList stringNames, ArrayList doubleNames, ArrayList integerNames, ref Hashtable values)
methods.summary: Retrieves all properties for the model object in one hashtable. Type for the returned value must be checked using type casting.

params.name: stringNames
params.doc: An array list containing the names of the string properties.

params.name: doubleNames
params.doc: An array list containing the names of the double properties.

params.name: integerNames
params.doc: An array list containing the names of the integer properties.

params.name: values
params.doc: The return value, a hash table list that contains all the values that were retrieved successfully.

returns.doc: True if at least one single property was retrieved successfully.

methods.name: GetAllUserProperties
methods.summary: Retrieves all properties for the model object in one hashtable. Type for the returned value must be checked using type casting.

params.name: values
params.doc: The return value, a hash table that contains all the values that were retrieved successfully.

returns.doc: True if at least one single property was retrieved successfully.

methods.name: GetChildren
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator of all the children model objects.

returns.doc: A model object enumerator on success, otherwise null.

methods.name: GetCoordinateSystem
methods.summary: Returns the coordinate system for the given model object.

returns.doc: The coordinate system for the given model object.

methods.name: GetCustomObjectType
methods.summary: Gets custom object type name from an existing object.

returns.doc: Type name string, empty string if type is not set.

methods.name: GetDoubleReportProperties
methods.signature: public bool GetDoubleReportProperties(ArrayList names, ref Hashtable values)
methods.summary: Retrieves multiple double report properties for the model object. It is faster to fetch multiple properties at once.

params.name: names
params.doc: An array list containing the names of the properties.

params.name: values
params.doc: The return value, a hash table that contains all the values that were retrieved successfully.

returns.doc: True if at least one single property was retrieved successfully.

methods.name: GetDoubleUserProperties
methods.summary: Retrieves all double properties for the model object.

params.name: values
params.doc: The return value, a hash table that contains all the values that were retrieved successfully.

returns.doc: True if at least one single property was retrieved successfully.

methods.name: GetDynamicStringProperty
methods.signature: public bool GetDynamicStringProperty(string name, ref string value)
methods.summary: Gets a dynamic string property from the model object.

params.name: name
params.doc: The name of the property to be set.

params.name: value
params.doc: The new value for the property.

returns.doc: True if the property was set successfully.

methods.name: GetFatherComponent
methods.summary: Returns the father component of the model object.

returns.doc: A base component on success, otherwise null.

methods.name: GetHierarchicObjects
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator of all the connected hierarchic objects.

returns.doc: A model object enumerator on success, otherwise null.

methods.name: GetIntegerReportProperties
methods.signature: public bool GetIntegerReportProperties(ArrayList names, ref Hashtable values)
methods.summary: Retrieves multiple integer report properties for the model object. It is faster to fetch multiple properties at once.

params.name: names
params.doc: An array list containing the names of the properties.

params.name: values
params.doc: The return value, a hash table that contains all the values that were retrieved successfully.

methods.name: GetIntegerUserProperties
methods.summary: Retrieves all integer properties for the model object.

params.name: values
params.doc: The return value, a hash table that contains all the values that were retrieved successfully.

returns.doc: True if at least one single property was retrieved successfully.

methods.name: GetPhase
methods.summary: Retrieves the phase of the model object (the phase number, the phase name, the phase comment and whether the phase is the current one or not).

params.name: phase
params.doc: The returned phase.

returns.doc: True on success.

methods.name: GetReportProperty(String, Double.)
methods.signature: public bool GetReportProperty(string name, ref double value)
methods.summary: Retrieves a double property of the report for the model object.

params.name: name
params.doc: The name of the property to be retrieved.

params.name: value
params.doc: The return value.

returns.doc: True if the value was returned successfully.

params.name: name

params.name: value
params.doc: The return value.

returns.doc: True if the value was returned successfully.

params.name: value
params.doc: The return value.

returns.doc: True if the value was returned successfully.

params.name: values

methods.signature: public bool GetUserProperty(string name, ref double value)
methods.summary: Retrieves a double property for the model object.

params.name: name
params.doc: The name of the property to be retrieved.

params.doc: The return value.

methods.name: GetUserProperty(String, Int32.)
methods.signature: public bool GetUserProperty(string name, ref int value)
methods.summary: Retrieves an integer property for the model object.

params.name: name
params.doc: The name of the property to be retrieved.

params.name: value
params.doc: The return value.

methods.name: GetUserProperty(String, String.)
methods.signature: public bool GetUserProperty(string name, ref string value)
methods.summary: Retrieves a string property for the model object.

methods.name: Insert
methods.summary: Inserts the hierarchical object instance in the model.

returns.doc: True if the insertion was successful.

methods.name: Modify
methods.summary: Modifies the hierarchical object instance in the model. The ID must be set.

returns.doc: True if the modification was successful.

methods.name: RemoveObjects
methods.summary: Removes associations to the given list of model objects. Fails if the hierarchical definition doesn't exist in the model.

params.name: Objects
params.doc: The model objects.

returns.doc: True if successful.

methods.name: Select
methods.summary: Selects the hierarchical object instance from the model. The ID must be set.

returns.doc: True if the selection was successful.

methods.name: SetCustomObjectType
methods.summary: Sets a custom object type name for an existing object.

params.name: type
params.doc: The custom obect type name to set to the model object.

returns.doc: True on success.

methods.name: SetDynamicStringProperty
methods.signature: public bool SetDynamicStringProperty(string name, string value)
methods.summary: Sets a dynamic string property for the model object.

params.name: name
params.doc: The name of the property to be set.

params.name: value
params.doc: The new value for the property.

returns.doc: True if the property was set successfully.

methods.name: SetLabel
methods.summary: Sets a label for an object when a new instance is created, this method must be called before Insert. The label is used in plug-ins for identifying the changed object in modification.

params.name: label
params.doc: The label to set to the model object.

returns.doc: True on success.

methods.name: SetPhase
methods.summary: Sets the phase of the model object.

params.name: phase
params.doc: The new phase. A phase with this phase's number must exist in the database.

returns.doc: True on success.

methods.name: SetUserProperties
methods.signature: public bool SetUserProperties(List<string> stringPropertyNames, List<string> stringValues, List<string> doublePropertyNames, List<double> doubleValues, List<string> intPropertyNames, List<int> intValues)
methods.summary: Sets multiple properties for the model object.

params.name: stringPropertyNames
params.doc: The names of the string properties to be set.

params.name: stringValues
params.doc: The new values for the string properties.

params.name: doublePropertyNames
params.doc: The names of the double properties to be set.

params.name: doubleValues
params.doc: The new values for the double properties.

params.name: intPropertyNames
params.doc: The names of the int properties to be set.

params.name: intValues
params.doc: The new values for the int properties.

returns.doc: True if the property was set successfully.

methods.name: SetUserProperty(String, Double)
methods.signature: public bool SetUserProperty(string name, double value)
methods.summary: Sets a double property for the model object.

params.name: name
params.doc: The name of the property to be set.

params.name: value
params.doc: The new value for the property.

returns.doc: True if the property was set successfully.

methods.name: SetUserProperty(String, Int32)
methods.signature: public bool SetUserProperty(string name, int value)
methods.summary: Sets an integer property for the model object.

params.name: name
params.doc: The name of the property to be set.

params.name: value
params.doc: The new value for the property.

returns.doc: True if the property was set successfully.

methods.name: SetUserProperty(String, String)
methods.signature: public bool SetUserProperty(string name, string value)
methods.summary: Sets a string property for the model object.

params.name: name
params.doc: The name of the property to be set.

params.name: value
params.doc: The new value for the property.

returns.doc: True if the property was set successfully.

properties.name: Definition
properties.summary: The hierarchical definition which the hierarchical object is associated with.

properties.name: Father
properties.summary: The father of the hierarchical object.

properties.name: HierarchicChildren
properties.summary: An array list that contains the hierarchical object's hierarchical children (of the type hierarchical object).

properties.name: IsUpToDate
properties.summary: Gets if the object does not have a modification which is not shared.

properties.name: ModificationTime
properties.summary: Gets latest time of the object was modified or created.
properties.remarks: The returned time is time of history revision which the object belongs to. For Sharing it is WriteOut time, for multiuser is save time. If history it not written then this method returns null.

properties.name: Name
properties.summary: The name of the hierarchical object.
